calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Oct-02-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Paul P. Young, Esq. 626-744-1838 for Plaintiff/Judgment creditor Mario Maso.
Niall Brosnan, 415-341-3511 Defendant/Judgment Debtor in Pro Per.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. Parties report everything is satisfactory, payments are working out. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF NIALL BROSNAN.

Off calendar per stipulation of the parties.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Sep-20-2018 Continued To Oct-02-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF MARIO MASO's HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is CONTINUED to October 2, 2018 per agreement of all parties (email 9-18-18). Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR# 8600 =(302/RBU)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jun-20-2018 Continued To Sep-20-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Chris Tirrell, Esq. 415-308-3637 of the Law Offices of Greg Groeneveld specially appearing for Plaintiff.
Niall Brosnan 415-341-3511 Defendant in Pro Per.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. Defendant informs the Court how much he is willing to pay per month. Parties meet and confer in the hallway re: bills. After meet and confer, the parties report they have reached an agreement on the garnishment. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF NIALL BROSNAN.

Granted in part. Defendant Niall Brosnan is to pay $650 per pay period per the stipulation of the parties. The matter is continued to 9/20/18 at 9:30 am to review today's order.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
